title: Neuro-Sama of Undying
description: Bored with your usual Totem of Undying? Replace it with a Neuro-Sama!
body:
Neuro-Sama of Undying

Resourcepack for the Minecraft

Bored with your usual Totem of Undying? Replace it with Neuro-Sama or her friends!

### 1 Release version: - 2 **Person Versions** of the resourcepack: **[Neuro-Sama](https://github.com/ami-amai/neurosama-of-undying/blob/main/page/neuro-sama/neuro-sama.md)** and **[Evilyn](https://github.com/ami-amai/neurosama-of-undying/blob/main/page/evilyn/evilyn.md)** - Support for all **Game Versions** ### In the future: * Vedal * Sounds * Another persons ### [Changelog](https://github.com/ami-amai/neurosama-of-undying/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) **See additional files for alternative versions** ----- [@CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0) **Get on: [@Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/neurosama-of-undying) [@Github](https://github.com/ami-amai/neurosama-of-undying) [@CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/neuro-sama-of-undying)**
